description_for_human: DeFi hard intelligence feeds for AI agents. Six paid risk signals on Base. Every paid response carries a Proof-of-Context attestation.
description_for_model: Vigil exposes six paid risk-intelligence endpoints designed for AI agents that trade DeFi: oracle health (Chainlink staleness, deviation, sequencer status), liquidation cascade simulation (Aave V3), MEV exposure score per pool/trade-size, real-time sandwich activity detection, and predictive impermanent-loss risk for LP positions. All paid endpoints are x402-native on Base L2 (USDC). Every response is wrapped with an Ed25519-signed Proof-of-Context attestation typed as f_i (input freshness) with a declared per-feed horizon. A consumer that integrates the attestation can refuse to settle downstream computation if the signal drifted past horizon. Service catalog at https://vigil-production.up.railway.app/services.json.
